question_text: Which statement correctly describes what happens when an ammeter is placed in a circuit?

options.label: A
options.text: An ammeter should be connected in parallel with the component

options.label: B
options.text: An ammeter must be connected in series with the circuit to measure current

options.label: C
options.text: An ammeter measures voltage across a component

options.label: D
options.text: An ammeter should have very high resistance to avoid affecting the circuit

explanation: Ammeters measure current and must be connected in series (in line with the circuit) so the current flows through them. They have very low resistance so they don't affect the circuit measurements.
